description: Seen in flight high above ground as it entered the park from the southeast (corner of 17th Avenue and Colorado Boulevard)The bird was in a flat/horizontal and completely stretched-out flying posture, with somewhat slow and deliberate wingbeats, flying directly west/northwest toward the park's Ferril Lake (again, high aboveground and not descending), then circling above the lake about 3 times in an arc of no more than 50-75 feet across, then turning directly west/northwest again and continuing out of sight beyond trees that obstructed my further vieweBird Checklist
